name: openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG
description: The sig for confidential computing technologies.

name: openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG maintains 19 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The sig for confidential computing technologies.. The SIG has 18 core members and maintains 19 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG maintains 19 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-confidential-computing.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-confidential-computing SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Guijin Gao, Maodong Chen, Linhao Zhang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
